title: Integration of External APIs in monday.com Apps: Compliance and Security Inquiry
excerpt: Can monday.com app developers integrate and utilize external paid APIs (e.g., OpenAi, Hunter.io) within their apps, effectively acting as intermediaries to provide services to monday.com marketplace users? Concerns relat…

posts.author: Ethanolle (Ethan Syagh - Monday.com Expert Certified Partner | Co-founder @Ethanolle)
posts.cookedHtml: Can monday.com app developers integrate and utilize external paid APIs (e.g., OpenAi, Hunter.io) within their apps, effectively acting as intermediaries to provide services to monday.com marketplace users? Concerns relate to compliance and security. Thank you.
